description:
Creative Question Mark Shape Table Lamp, USB Three-color Dimming Desktop Decoration Table Lamp

1.Creative Question Mark Shape Table Lamp, 3 Temperatures, for Bedroom, Living Room, Decorat, Party and Caaux .3 Color Temperatures：The indoor table lamp with three dimmable colors, warm light 3000k, natural light 4500k, white light 6000k, you can press the to choose different color temperatures to suit the life scene and mood, there is always a light color that suits you.
2.Energy-saving light: LED bedside lamps with uniform light and soft light have long life, low power consumpt, no dark areas, excellent bright light (no dimmer).
3.Product material: The table lamp adopts baking paint process, anti- and anti-rust spiral-shaped acrylic lamp body and non-slip sponge bottom pad.
4.Unique : The elegant lines display its minimalist and fashable artistic beauty, while avoiding direct lighting and eye damage. Place the desk lamp in your living room and bedroom, and its unique shape will add new visual effects to your room.
